summary: Updated PR title/body to the canonical printed CLI template with CLI shape, reviewed PR #1149 comments for the capabilities/dashboard-handoff pattern, added more SendFox-specific novel agent commands, and fixed Greptile review findings around auth env guidance, logout warnings, canonical signup-form env var, pagination truncation, and dogfood-results packaging.
review_fixes: auth setup/status now steer users to SENDFOX_API_TOKEN
auth logout warns if SENDFOX_API_TOKEN remains exported
forms generate server-handler comment references SENDFOX_API_TOKEN
sendfoxFetchAll no longer stops after a short page without explicit pagination metadata
PR title changed to feat(sendfox): add sendfox
validation: dry-run smoke: capabilities, contacts audit-csv, contacts reconcile-csv, workflow launch-plan, webhooks handoff
notes: Campaign create/send and webhook CRUD remain dashboard handoffs because the documented SendFox public API exposes campaign reads and webhook setup docs, not public write endpoints.
